name: Cherry Pineapple Kugel
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. crushed pineapple in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 X13 baking dish.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine melted margarine with noodles; toss well to coat.
4. Add eggs, sugar, vanilla, and pineapple; mix well.
5. Pour half of the noodle mixture into the prepared dish.
6. Spread with either cherry pie filling or apricot preserves.
7. Cover with remaining noodle mixture.
8. Lightly crush corn flakes and combine with sugar and cinnamon.
9. Sprinkle over top of kugel.
10. Dot with margarine.
11. Bake for 40 minutes or until golden.
